title: PMO Analyst - Contract
description:
Company Overview

Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one person to formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.

Job Summary

The PMO Analyst will provide end-to-end PMO and operational support to the Project Manager and Delivery Lead, ensuring effective governance, coordination, reporting, and day-to-day project operations across the IT project lifecycle.

Responsibilities

  • Capture and summarise meeting notes, minutes, key decisions, and action items accurately, and circulate outputs promptly to relevant stakeholders
  • Maintain and update Risk, Issue, Action, and Decision (RAID) logs collaboratively with the project team to ensure current and actionable project risk management
  • Support the upkeep and periodic revision of the Project Management Plan (PMP) to reflect agreed processes, governance frameworks, and delivery approaches
  • Manage structured storage, version control, and accessibility of all project documentation in compliance with project and organisational standards
  • Coordinate, consolidate, and manage the development of project presentations and reports, including Weekly Status Reports, SteerCo / PSC decks, and management updates, ensuring consistent messaging and high presentation quality
  • Collaborate with functional, technical, and delivery teams to gather inputs and maintain alignment in stakeholder communications across the programme
  • Manage onboarding and offboarding activities for project resources by coordinating with HR, IT, and security teams to ensure smooth transitions
  • Maintain a comprehensive resource inventory detailing roll-on and roll-off dates, roles, skills, and team allocations to provide visibility on resource utilisation and upcoming needs
  • Arrange and schedule project meetings, book meeting rooms and facilities, and support office and project room logistics including supplies coordination
  • Assist in planning workshops, key project meetings, and programme events to support effective project delivery
  • Provide day-to-day operational support to the Project Manager and Delivery Lead by managing open tasks, follow-ups, and coordination activities to ensure adherence to governance, standards, and delivery timelines
